zh.lifeSummary: 當Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier於1200年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛時，她的父親Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence15歲，母親Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier20歲。她於1220年與Guillaume II de Béarn在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納艾爾 吉洛斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1268年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier于1200年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛时，她的父亲Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence15岁，母亲Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier20岁。她于1220年与Guillaume II de Béarn在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納艾爾 吉洛斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1268年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Provence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Province   1, a cognate of 3 below. This surname is very rare in Britain.
Probably also an altered form of   Provance   1 and hence a variant of   Purviance  , a surname of (ultimately) Scottish origin. Compare   Provance   1.
In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Provence, a region in southern France (see   Provencal  ). Compare   Province   3 and also 1 above.

variants.name: Province
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Provence, a region in southern France (see   Provencal  ). Compare   Provence   1 and   Provins   1.
Altered form of   Provance   1 and hence a variant of   Purviance  , a surname of (ultimately) Scottish origin. Compare   Provins   2.
Americanized form of French   Provence   3.

nameMeanings.name: Sabran
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Sabin  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sabin
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Northamptonshire): from the Middle English personal name Sabin (from Latin Sabinus; see 2 below) or its female equivalent Sabine (from Latin Sabina). In medieval England the feminine form was always more popular as a personal name.

French: from the Old French personal name Sabin, from Latin Sabinus. The name was originally referred to the Sabines, an ancient Italic people of central Italy whose name is of uncertain origin. In the 8th century BC the Romans slaughtered the Sabine menfolk and carried off the women. More influential as far as name-giving is concerned was the existence of several early Christian saints named Sabinus.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sabháin ‘descendant of Sabhán’, a personal name based on sabh ‘cub’. As an Irish surname, this has mostly been absorbed into Savage .

en.lifeSummary: When Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier was born in 1200, in Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence, was 15 and her mother, Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, was 20. She married Guillaume II de Béarn in 1220, in el Gironès, Girona, Catalonia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1268, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier est née en 1200, à Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume II de Béarn en 1220, à el Gironès, Girona, Catalunya, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1268, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier 1200 in Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence 15 und ihre Mutter Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier 20. Sie hat 1220 in el Gironès, Girona, Catalunya, Spanien Guillaume II de Béarn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1268 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier è nata il nel 1200 nel Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume II de Béarn nel 1220, nel el Gironès, Girona, Catalunya, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1268, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquierが1200年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンで生まれた時，父Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provenceは15歳，母Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquierは20歳であった。1220年にスペインカタルニーアギロナエル ギロンeスでGuillaume II de Béarnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1268年にフランスピカーディソンメで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier(이)가 1200년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 로트-트-가니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1220년 스페인 카털니아 지로나 엘 지론e스에서 Guillaume II de Béarn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1268년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier nasceu em 1200, em Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume II de Béarn em 1220, em el Gironès, Girona, Catalunya, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1268, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier родилась в 1200 г. в местности лот-ет-гаронн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume II de Béarn в 1220 г. в местности эл гиронeс, гирона, каталуня, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1268 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gersende De Provence De Sabran Y Folcaquier nació en 1200, en Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Guillaume II de Béarn en 1220, en el Gironès, Gerona, Cataluña, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1268, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 68 años.
